payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden paneled cabinet door (vertical recessed panels with beveled edges), surface shows matte stained wood grain and no visible hardware in the crop; the cabinet is partially edge-cropped by the image border and appears about 1.2 m from the camera.
